notes: Retrospective calibration cases use official publisher/retraction notices as labels after a blind signal pass.
Do not use these labels as proof produced by GengScope; they are ground-truth references for calibration only.
The blind pass should import metadata, discover materials and inspect existing algorithmic signals before recording official retraction events.

cases.title_hint: P-Glycoprotein Exacerbates Brain Injury Following Experimental Cerebral Ischemia

official_notice.source_name: Wiley / Oxidative Medicine and Cellular Longevity
official_notice.reason_summary: Publisher notice reports image and data overlap/duplication concerns affecting multiple figures and reliability.

cases.title_hint: Dietary Valine Ameliorated Gut Health and Accelerated the Development of Nonalcoholic Fatty Liver Disease

official_notice.source_name: Wiley / Oxidative Medicine and Cellular Longevity
official_notice.reason_summary: Publisher notice reports duplicated Figure 2 panels, incorrect primer information in Table 2, overlapping Figure 1 features and unreliable data/conclusions.

cases.title_hint: Comparison of preventive and therapeutic effects of continuous exercise on acute lung injury induced with methotrexate

official_notice.reason_summary: Publisher notice reports figure tissue-identity concerns, unavailable original immunohistochemistry slides, inconsistent histology/magnification and unreliable data/conclusions.

cases.title_hint: Evaluation of Genetic Variations in Maize Seedlings Exposed to Electric Field Based on Protein and DNA Markers

official_notice.reason_summary: Publisher notice reports image manipulation in Figure 4, duplicated bands in Figures 1-3 and no author response to a request for original data.

cases.title_hint: Efficient Oil Spill Uptake Using Surface-Modified Magnetite Nanoparticles with PET Waste Derivatives

official_notice.reason_summary: Publisher notice reports data irregularities and image integrity issues, including duplicated Figures 4a/4b from another article's Figures 5a/5b.
